index_page.page_description: Move from connected accounts to the first publish-ready drafts without leaving the module.
index_page.read_only_description: You can review accounts and existing drafts, but only authorized users can change content right now.

cards.accounts_description: Check which pages and profiles are truly available before using them in a draft.
cards.composer_description: Prepare text, image, link, scheduling, and target selection from one clean Pulse screen.

index_page.recent_drafts_description: Pick up the last Pulse drafts without rebuilding the target selection from zero.
index_page.empty_recent_drafts: No Pulse draft has been saved yet.

accounts_page.page_description: Prepare, connect, and monitor the social accounts that Malikia Pulse will use for multi-network publishing.

composer_page.page_description: Create, publish, or schedule a simple Pulse post with text, image, link, schedule, and target account selection.

templates_page.page_description: Keep reusable post structures, remember the right target accounts, and reload them directly inside the composer.

history_page.page_description: Review recent Pulse posts, filter the history, duplicate working content, and reopen published posts as editable reposts.

composer_manager.title: Draft composer
composer_manager.description: Save a clean Pulse draft, then publish it now or schedule it across the connected accounts you selected.
composer_manager.read_only_description: You can review targets and drafts, but you need `social.manage` or `social.publish` to save changes.
composer_manager.prefill_description: The current content stays linked to {source} until you remove that source.
composer_manager.suggestions_description: Generate a few base captions, editable hashtags, and reusable CTAs without making the composer noisy.
composer_manager.suggestions_hashtags_description: Add, remove, or apply these hashtags to the current text whenever they help.
composer_manager.suggestions_ctas_description: Add a simple action line at the end of the text when it fits.
composer_manager.targets_description: Choose one or more active social accounts for this draft.
composer_manager.drafts_description: Recent Pulse drafts stay scoped to the tenant and keep their target selection.
composer_manager.templates_description: Save the current content as a reusable template, then reload it as the base for a new draft.
composer_manager.empty_drafts: No Pulse draft has been saved yet.
composer_manager.empty_templates: No Pulse template has been saved yet.
composer_manager.empty_suggestions: Generate suggestions whenever you want to speed up the writing for this post.
composer_manager.empty_connected_description: Connect at least one active social account in Accounts before saving a draft.
composer_manager.preview_description: Quickly review the message, image, link, schedule, and selected accounts before saving.
composer_manager.preview_empty_text: Your Pulse text preview will appear here.

approval.pending_title: This post is waiting for approval
approval.pending_description: The content stays locked until an approver validates or rejects it.
approval.pending_actionable_description: Review the content, then approve or reject this request from the composer.
approval.rejected_description: You can update the content and submit the post again for approval.

messages.load_error: The Pulse composer could not be refreshed.
messages.save_error: The Pulse draft could not be saved.
messages.template_save_error: The Pulse template could not be saved from this draft.
messages.template_save_success: The Pulse template has been saved.
messages.template_applied: The Pulse template has been loaded into the composer.
messages.template_applied_with_missing_targets: The Pulse template has been loaded, but {count} target still needs to be reconnected or reselected.
messages.prefill_applied: The Pulse prefill from {source} was loaded into the composer.
messages.suggestions_load_error: The Pulse suggestions could not be loaded.
messages.caption_applied: The suggested caption has been applied to the text.
messages.hashtags_applied: The hashtags have been added to the text.
messages.cta_applied: The CTA has been added to the text.
messages.hashtag_added: The hashtag has been added to the list.
messages.submit_approval_error: The Pulse post could not be submitted for approval.
messages.submit_approval_success: The Pulse post was submitted for approval.
messages.approve_error: The Pulse request could not be approved.
messages.reject_error: The Pulse request could not be rejected.
messages.publish_error: The Pulse post could not be queued for publishing.
messages.publish_success: The Pulse post has been queued for publishing.
messages.schedule_error: The Pulse post could not be scheduled.
messages.schedule_success: The Pulse post has been scheduled.

template_manager.title: Template library
template_manager.description: Keep recurring post structures ready to reload into the Pulse composer without rewriting everything.
template_manager.read_only_description: You can review and reuse Pulse templates, but `social.manage` or `social.publish` is required to edit them.
template_manager.targets_description: Attach the connected accounts you most often want to reuse with this template.
template_manager.library_description: Each template stays scoped to the tenant and can be sent back into the composer as an editable base.
template_manager.no_targets: No target has been stored in this template yet.
template_manager.empty_templates: No Pulse template has been saved yet.
template_manager.empty_connected_description: Connect at least one social account if you want to store targets inside a template.

messages.load_error: The Pulse template library could not be refreshed.
messages.save_error: The Pulse template could not be saved.
messages.save_success: The Pulse template has been saved.
messages.update_success: The Pulse template has been updated.
messages.delete_error: The Pulse template could not be deleted.
messages.delete_success: The Pulse template has been deleted.

history_manager.title: Post history
history_manager.description: Review published, failed, scheduled, and draft Pulse posts, then duplicate or reopen them without rebuilding the content from scratch.
history_manager.read_only_description: You can review the Pulse history, but you need `social.manage` or `social.publish` to duplicate or reopen posts.
history_manager.filters_description: Narrow the history with a quick search, a status, or a platform when you need to reuse a previous post.

approval.pending: This post is waiting for approval before publishing.

messages.load_error: The Pulse history could not be refreshed.
messages.approve_error: The Pulse request could not be approved from history.
messages.approve_success: The Pulse request was approved from history.
messages.reject_error: The Pulse request could not be rejected from history.
messages.reject_success: The Pulse request was rejected from history.
messages.duplicate_error: This Pulse post could not be duplicated.
messages.duplicate_success: The Pulse post has been duplicated.
messages.repost_error: This Pulse post could not be reopened as a repost.
messages.repost_success: The Pulse repost draft has been created.

history_manager.no_targets: No connected target is currently attached to this copy.
history_manager.empty_title: No Pulse post yet in this history
history_manager.empty_description: Publish, schedule, or save a first draft to start building the reusable Pulse history.
history_manager.empty_text: No text was saved on this Pulse post.

accounts_manager.title: Connect your networks
accounts_manager.description: Choose a network, start authentication, then quickly confirm the connection is ready to publish.
accounts_manager.directory_hint: One click on a platform is enough to start the connection flow.
accounts_manager.read_only_description: You can review connections, but only the owner can connect, test, or edit an account.

auth.title: Connect the network
auth.description: Choose the platform and authorize access from the social account.

test.title: Verify the connection
test.description: Run a simple test to confirm the token and permissions are valid.

publish.title: Publish with confidence
publish.description: Once validated, the account stays ready to be targeted from the Pulse composer.

modal.accounts_empty_title: No account on this platform yet
modal.accounts_empty_description: Start the connection flow to add the first account.
modal.no_permissions: Permissions will appear here after OAuth.
modal.read_only_notice: This view is read-only for your role.
modal.connected_toggle_hint: Turn this off if you want to keep the account saved without using it in upcoming targets.
modal.technical_description: This information is mainly useful for support or debugging.

messages.load_error: The Pulse accounts page could not be refreshed.
messages.save_error: The Pulse account could not be saved.
messages.authorize_error: The Pulse OAuth flow could not be started.
messages.test_error: The Pulse connection needs to be checked.
messages.disconnect_error: The Pulse account could not be disconnected.
messages.delete_error: The Pulse account could not be deleted.
